pages.title: Lunar Edge
pages.text: Sword enchantment. Adds bonus damage that scales with the current moon phase — negligible under a new moon, significant on a $(l:events/full_moon)full moon$() and $(l:events/blood_moon)blood moon$() nights.$(br2)$(italic)Enchanting is disabled during daylight$() — read the next page for why.

pages.title: Lunar Shield
pages.text: Armor enchantment. Reduces incoming damage from hostile mobs during the night. Stacks across armor pieces up to a cap.$(br2)Particularly effective during blood moons — the same phase when you need it most.

pages.title: Daylight enchanting restriction
pages.text: Nyx's enchanting table refuses to produce lunar enchantments under direct sunlight — the glyphs need moonlight to fix. Enchant at night, or underground with a clear line of sight to the sky after sundown.$(br2)Standard enchanting (Sharpness, Protection, etc.) is unaffected.
